title: ChatGPT Power Workflows for Business
modules: Beyond the Basics: How GPT-4o Actually Works and Where It Fails
Prompt Craft for Business Outputs: Briefs, Reports, and Decisions
Custom GPTs: Building Reusable Tools for Your Team
Data Analysis, Code Interpreter, and Document Workflows
Governance, Confidentiality, and Safe Business Use
synopsis: Most business professionals use ChatGPT at a fraction of its capability — this course closes that gap fast. From Custom GPTs to Advanced Data Analysis, you will build repeatable, professional-grade workflows that save hours and sharpen output quality across the functions that matter most to your role.
rationale: ChatGPT is the most widely adopted AI tool in professional settings, yet the gap between average and expert use translates directly into productivity and output quality disparities across teams.
learning_outcome: Build at least one Custom GPT and two reusable prompt workflows that immediately reduce time-on-task for high-frequency deliverables in your role.
source_signals: Adding a feature because ChatGPT incorrectly thinks it exists (score: 2571)
People tricking ChatGPT 'like watching an Asimov novel come to life' (score: 3085)
